title: tinus lateriflora
intro: Tinus lateriflora, also known as Texas Sage or Purple Sage, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Tinus lateriflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Tinus lateriflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make a calming and soothing drink or applied topically to alleviate skin irritations.
